author: anon-295fd0bb
content: Starting implementation. Fixing in order: (1) read_layout_version to detect V2 from directory structure, (2) promote_offline_issues to use issue_rel_path, (3) read_all_issue_files to dedup by UUID preferring V2, (4) compaction materialize to respect layout version + clean stale V1, (5) write version.json during compaction if missing.
